crisis.attachedSub: is on call for your family tonight.
crisis.directSub: is on call and will respond first.

tier.essentialFeatures: Message the on-call coach · full app · groups
tier.premiumFeatures: Phone & video calls with a coach, business hours

paywall.heading: Subscribe for full access
paywall.body: Essential members get daily check-ins, mood tracking, boundaries, scripts, messaging, and groups.
paywall.autoRenewDisclosure: Essential is $14.99/month and Premium is $44.99/month, billed to your Apple Account. Subscriptions renew automatically unless turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Manage or cancel anytime in your Apple Account settings.

mondayGroup.heading: Monday Family Support Group
mondayGroup.sub: Our free weekly group call — no subscription needed. RSVP to get the Zoom link.

messages.comingSoon: Messaging launches with your coach assignment. Tap 'Talk to someone now' for immediate support.

referral.title: Work with a professional interventionist.
referral.body: Get matched with a vetted provider organization for assigned coaching, family sessions, and intervention support.

upgradeSheet.title: Upgrade to Premium
upgradeSheet.feature1: Phone calls with the on-call coach
upgradeSheet.note: $44.99/month, billed to your Apple Account. Renews automatically unless turned off at least 24 hours before the period ends. Manage or cancel anytime in your Apple Account settings.
upgradeSheet.iapError: Something went wrong with the purchase. Please try again.
upgradeSheet.iapNoOfferings: Subscriptions are not available right now. Please try again later.

questionModal.title: Submit a question
questionModal.sub: Your question will be reviewed before the meeting.
questionModal.placeholder: What would you like answered on the call?

community.title: Community
community.belongingNoSchedule: {{count}} families are part of this community.
community.belongingZero: Be the first to say hello.
community.guidelines: Be kind. This is peer support between families — not medical advice. In an emergency, call 911 or 988.
community.empty: No posts yet. Share an encouragement, a small win, or a question.
community.reportConfirmBody: Our team will review it. Thanks for keeping this space safe.
community.crisisTitle: It sounds like things are really hard right now
community.crisisBody: A peer feed isn't the safest place for this — but help is, and you're not alone.
community.safetyFooter: In crisis? Call or text 988, or call 911.

chat.headerSub: On-call coach · replies as soon as available · not for emergencies
chat.crisisNote: In an emergency, always call 911 or 988.
chat.archiveBody: This conversation will be saved and a new one will start. You can ask your coach to access past conversations.
chat.presenceBody: No question is too small or too messy — insurance, a hard conversation, something you saw last night. {{coach}} reads every message and a real coach replies within a few hours during business hours.

intervention.title: When you're ready, you don't have to do it alone
intervention.intro: An intervention isn't an ambush — it's a planned, loving conversation, and having a professional guide it changes everything. There's no pressure here and no timeline but your own.
intervention.whatTitle: What planning with Matt looks like
intervention.step1: A private conversation about your situation — no judgment, nothing to memorize.
intervention.step2: A plan built around your family: who's in the room, what's said, and what comes after.
intervention.step3: Matt stays with you through the conversation itself and the steps that follow.
intervention.primaryCtaSub: We'll reach out to set up a time — no commitment.
intervention.reassure: Not yet? That's completely okay. This will be here when you're ready.
intervention.crisisNote: If someone is in immediate danger, call 911 or 988.

coaching.cardTitle: Private Zoom session with a coach
coaching.cardBody: A full hour, one-on-one — your situation, your questions, a concrete plan. $150/hour.
coaching.title: Book 1:1 coaching
coaching.subtitle: {{rate}}/hour · private Zoom session
coaching.description: Tell us when you are available and what you want to work on. We will reach out to confirm a time and arrange payment — your private Zoom link will appear here once confirmed.
coaching.confirmNote: We'll confirm the exact time by email or phone.
coaching.contactLabel: Best way to reach you (email or phone)
coaching.noteLabel: What would you like to focus on? (optional)
coaching.notePlaceholder: Boundaries with my son, preparing for an intervention...
coaching.paymentNote: $150/hour. We will confirm your time and send payment details by message within one business day.
coaching.submitted: ✓ Request received — we will be in touch to confirm your time and arrange payment.

crisisProtocol.heading: Crisis guide
crisisProtocol.sub: Step-by-step guidance for when it's happening right now.

overdose.title: Suspected overdose
steps: If Narcan (naloxone) is available, administer it now.
Place them on their side (recovery position) to prevent choking.
Stay on the line with 911 and follow their instructions.
Do not leave them alone until help arrives.
Good Samaritan laws protect you — call 911.

selfHarm.title: Self-harm or suicidal crisis
steps: Ask directly: "Are you thinking about hurting yourself?"
Remove or secure access to means if it is safe to do so.
Call or text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline) together if possible.
Do not leave them alone until the crisis passes or help arrives.
If you believe they are in immediate danger, call 911.

unsafe.title: Aggressive or unsafe behavior
steps: Do not argue or try to reason with someone who is intoxicated or escalated.
Create physical distance — move to another room or leave the house.
If you feel threatened, leave immediately. Your safety comes first.
Call 911 if there is a threat of violence.
Do not attempt to physically restrain them.
Contact your coach or support network once you are safe.

finderCard.title: Find treatment & support
finderCard.sub: Search vetted treatment centers, interventionists, and sober coaches — with real availability.

textline.gatedBody: Text support is included with Essential and Premium. Upgrade to send private support messages and screenshots from inside the app.
textline.photosPermBody: Allow photo access to attach screenshots to this private support thread.

privateVideo.title: Premium private video session
privateVideo.body: Included for Premium members. Request a private in-app video support session; this is not an emergency service.
